resources.string: Persistent notification to keep service alive

To reduce the chances of this app\'s sound service being terminated by Android while it is running in the background, you can tell Android to ignore this app for battery optimizations.\n\nTo disable battery optimization for this app, tap the button below.
Battery Optimizations Disabled! Card will disappear on app restart.

This app spawns a service that runs in the foreground, and plays a sound of your choice when it detects that your device has been connected to a power source.

For best results, disable your device's built-in charging sound and vibration. This setting is usually a switch found under Sound settings in the Android Settings app.

If you've done this already, tap "Got it" to dismiss this message.
When the Settings app opens, scroll to the bottom and turn off the \"Charging sounds and vibration\" setting (may not appear the same on all devices).
You\'re about to navigate to Android Sound Settings

This app is (very much) in the alpha stages of development. Potentially major changes will be made from release to release, and the app may have bugs that will cause it to spontaneously stop working.\nPlease keep that in mind! :)
Turn this on if the sound plays more than once when charging begins.
When enabled, sounds will not be played if Do Not Disturb is active.
Choose the sound that plays when a charger is connected.

In order to browse sounds, I need permission to access your phone\'s files. You\'ll only have to do this once. After you\'ve chosen a sound, you can revoke the permission in Android\'s settings, should you choose to do so.\n\nIf you don\'t grant permissions, you won\'t be able to add any sounds.
That sound is too long! Pick a sound that\'s %1$d seconds or shorter.
Sorry, I wasn\'t able to read that file. It may be corrupted or unsupported. Try a different file.

In September of 2026, Google will begin requiring every Android developer to register with Google, or else their apps (even those released outside of the Play Store) will be blocked from installing on certified Android devices. These changes will severely hurt users and be detrimental to the Android platform's open and free nature.

I will not be registering with Google, and thus, this app will no longer function on certified Android devices (without hassle).

To learn more and find out ways to support the cause, please tap "Keep Android Open!" to visit keepandroidopen.org.

On Android 13 and later, notification permissions are required for foreground services. Don\'t worry, we\'re not going to bombard you with alerts. This is necessary to reduce the chance that the app\'s service will be terminated by Android.
Open Android Settings for this app
